rawHtmlImport.title: Paste HTML Source to Import
rawHtmlImport.hint: When the backend cannot reach a webpage (e.g. overseas site, login required, intranet restriction), open the page in a browser, view source, copy the HTML and paste it here. Readability will extract the body and convert it to Markdown.
